message:
feat(network): add DHCP server start/stop methods

Add Start(), Stop(), and IsRunning() methods to DHCPServer for managing
the dnsmasq process lifecycle. Start() validates binary existence,
writes config, creates lease file if needed, and spawns dnsmasq in
foreground mode. Stop() kills the process gracefully.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
